task_text: Using vendor_nda_template.txt as reference, write a short cover email (3-4 sentences) that we can send to a new vendor, Apex Data Services, asking them to review and sign the attached NDA. Save it as apex_nda_cover_email.txt.

content.text: Let me start by reading the template file so I can reference it appropriately.

content.content:
NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

This Non-Disclosure Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into between
NovaBridge Solutions Inc. ("Disclosing Party") and [VENDOR NAME] ("Receiving Party").

1. Confidential Information
The Receiving Party agrees to hold in strict confidence all technical, business,
and operational information disclosed by the Disclosing Party, including but not
limited to source code, system architecture, client data, and business processes.

2. Term
This Agreement shall remain in effect for three (3) years from the date of signature,
unless terminated earlier by written agreement of both parties.

3. Permitted Disclosures
The Receiving Party may disclose Confidential Information only to employees with a
demonstrated need to know, provided such employees are bound by equivalent obligations.

4. Return of Materials
Upon request or termination, the Receiving Party shall promptly return or certify
destruction of all Confidential Information and copies thereof.

5. Governing Law
This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of Delaware, USA.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties execute this Agreement as of the date below.

NovaBridge Solutions Inc.
Signature: _________________________ Date: __________
Name / Title:

[VENDOR NAME]
Signature: _________________________ Date: __________
Name / Title:

content.text: Now I have all the details I need. Let me write and save the cover email.

input.content:
Subject: Non-Disclosure Agreement – Apex Data Services & NovaBridge Solutions Inc.

Dear Apex Data Services Team,

We are pleased to move forward with our partnership and have attached a Non-Disclosure Agreement for your review, as required before we begin sharing any confidential information. The agreement covers the handling of technical, business, and operational information exchanged between Apex Data Services and NovaBridge Solutions Inc., and remains in effect for three years from the date of signature. Please review the document at your earliest convenience and return a signed copy to us. If you have any questions or require clarification on any of the terms, do not hesitate to reach out.

Warm regards,
NovaBridge Solutions Inc.

content.text:
Done! The file **apex_nda_cover_email.txt** has been saved. Here's a summary of what was written and why:

- **Vendor name & parties** – Correctly references *Apex Data Services* and *NovaBridge Solutions Inc.*, pulled directly from the template.
- **Purpose** – Makes clear the NDA is a prerequisite to sharing confidential information, consistent with the template's intent.
- **Key terms highlighted** – Briefly mentions the scope (technical, business, and operational information) and the 3-year term, so the vendor knows what they're signing without having to dig into the document cold.
- **Call to action** – Asks them to review, sign, and return the document, and invites questions — keeping the tone professional and approachable.
